Package calendar.view.gui.panels

Class CalendarListPanel

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.awt.Component
      • java.awt.Container
        • javax.swing.JComponent
          • javax.swing.JPanel
            • calendar.view.gui.panels.CalendarListPanel
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.awt.image.ImageObserver, java.awt.MenuContainer, java.io.Serializable, javax.accessibility.Accessible
    public class CalendarListPanel
extends javax.swing.JPanel
    Panel for displaying and managing multiple calendars. Provides a sidebar interface for calendar selection and management.

    Features: - List of available calendars with color coding - Calendar creation and editing - Calendar selection for active operations - Timezone display for each calendar

    See Also:
    Serialized Form
